query:
SELECT r.id, r.email, r.reminderSent24h, r.reminderSent1h, l.title, l.sessionDate 
FROM reminders r 
JOIN lectures l ON r.lectureId = l.id 
WHERE r.email = 'ALALAWI2@SQU.EDU.OM';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3gJPMgbNvxobdJv.c80c7479a201 --database kEGM3BVtTzTes7GE5TMbVx --execute SELECT r.id, r.email, r.reminderSent24h, r.reminderSent1h, l.title, l.sessionDate 
FROM reminders r 
JOIN lectures l ON r.lectureId = l.id 
WHERE r.email = 'ALALAWI2@SQU.EDU.OM';

rows.title: Beyond PubMed: AI-Powered Literature Search - Applications and Ethics
